final:
module top_module(
    input A, 
    input B, 
    input C, 
    input D, 
    input S0, 
    input S1, 
    wire neg_mux_output = (S1 == 0 && S0 == 0);
    assign Y = neg_mux_output ? A : (S1 == 0 && S0 == 1) ? B :
               (S1 == 1 && S0 == 0) ? C :
                                      D;

endmodule
